programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carl hace una última petición a Rick y Michonne antes de morir. Mientras tanto, Morgan y Carol intentan rescatar a Ezekiel antes de que Gavin se lo entregue vivo a Negan para que este lo torture y asesine delante de sus seguidores.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Negan ordena a Simon que mate solo a uno de los hombres de Jadis como escarmiento, pero Simon tiene sed de venganza. Mientras, Rick se dirige al basurero del grupo de Jadis para renovar su alianza, y Aaron sigue intentando obtener un acuerdo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A Maggie se le acaban las reservas de alimentos y debe decidir si deja que los presos pasen hambre. Mientras, Daryl guía a los supervivientes de Alexandria a través de un pantano repleto de zombis, y la adversidad pone a prueba la fe de Gabriel.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick ataca a Negan cuando este se dirigía a Hilltop y terminan enfrentándose en un edificio abandonado, pero Simon y Dwight siguen el rastro de Negan. Mientras tanto, Maggie, Enid, Michonne y Rosita discuten sobre la propuesta de una desconocida.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los Saviors, ahora dirigidos por Simon, atacan Hilltop pese a que algunos de sus combatientes están dentro, presos. Maggie organiza la defensa del poblado pero, ¿podrán evitar una masacre como la que Simon perpetró contra el grupo de Jadis?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Jadis planea una muerte horrenda para Negan. Mientras, Morgan va en busca de Henry y Rick sale de Hilltop para cazar a los que huyeron durante el asalto comandado por Simon. Finalmente, los dos se encuentran en territorio enemigo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras los hombres de Negan continúan con su ofensiva, Aaron sigue buscando aliados nuevos, pese a que pueda costarle la vida. Daryl y Rosita se enfrentan a un viejo amigo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Las comunidades unen sus fuerzas en la última batalla contra los Salvadores. Negan ha conseguido entregar a Rick un mapa con instrucciones mapas, para así tenderle una emboscada.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Las comunidades se unen para restaurar un puente que facilite la comunicación y el comercio, pero alguien resulta gravemente herido. Además, varios Saviors han desaparecido.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Seis años después de la desaparición de Rick, un grupo recién llegado a Alexandria, liderados por la temperamental Magna, genera problemas a los habitantes de la comunidad.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Ross learns a new way to finance solar panels and then installs a new solar power system for a homeowner. Tom Silva helps a family frame the walls for a basement remodeling project.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom restores the windows in a home built by George Washington. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Richard installs a water filter at a kitchen sink.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin and Scott install a manual transfer switch for a portable generator. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Richard heads to Dallas to fix a sewer line clogged with tree roots.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger and Kevin refinish several worn out items using spray paint. Richard shows Kevin some new "hands-free" household devices. Tom removes wall-to-wall carpet and installs a pre-finished wood floor.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom Silva kicks off the season of Ask This Old House by helping transform stock shelving into a custom built-in. Richard Trethewey installs a new washing machine valve that will prevent flooding.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger helps a homeowner install a bluestone patio in an urban backyard. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Tom helps a homeowner and her daughter hang their bikes in a small garage.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: General contractor Tom Silva builds a custom fireplace mantel for a homeowner. Then, Roger shares some tips about garden edging. Afterward, Richard helps a homeowner repair a leaking kitchen faucet.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger helps lay sod in his backyard. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Tom shares a tip about finding measurements without doing the math. Richard installs a wireless thermostat to control a heating system.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger helps a homeowner plant several varieties of palm trees. The guys ask "What Is It?". Richard replaces an old heating and hot water system with a smaller, more efficient single appliance

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin add task lighting to a Brooklyn kitchen. The guys play "What Is It" with Jimmy Fallon in Times Square. Roger visits the High Line. Tom adds a cable railing system to a Greenwich Village deck.

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Just when Jessica thinks she might still be in love with Jose, she receives a bombshell from him. Meanwhile, Sheree and Terrell find themselves at odds over their long-distance marriage.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Anxious to escape the stress in their lives, the ladies head to Napa Valley for a weekend of fine food, fine wine, and (hopefully) fine men. On the trip, Jessica confronts Jose about his bad choices and gives him an ultimatum.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Nicole sets Mayte up on her first blind date, which stresses Mayte out. Meanwhile, Jessica breaks the news about Jose to Josie and then is shocked to learn that Josie is planning a visit to Planned Parenthood.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Tony sets Andrea up on a date with a local friend, but she worries how he will react when he finds out that R. Kelly is her ex. Meanwhile, Mayte plans a big party for her mother's birthday.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Controversy erupts during a weekend getaway to Palm Springs after Jessica accuses the others of being hypocrites. Not one to take it lightly, Sheree calls Jessica out.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Back in L.A., resentments are still simmering after the altercation in Palm Springs. Mayte, who receives bad news from a fertility expert, is especially sensitive and confronts Jessica during a ladies night out.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: The ladies take sides after the confrontation between Mayte and Jessica. Meanwhile, Andrea starts to feel pressure from Percy and worries that their relationship is moving too quickly.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Mayte and Jessica attempt to repair their damaged relationship. Meanwhile, Sheree pitches her skin product, Whoop-Ash, to a trendy Hollywood boutique and Nicole prepares a public showing of her new clothing line.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: In this dramatic season finale, the ladies rehearse a number for Andrea's upcoming dance benefit, during which one of them has a serious and painful accident. With less than an hour before showtime, an ambulance is called...

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: In the season two premiere, Drea plans to confront Jessica about a comment she recently tweeted. Meanwhile, Jessica struggles to find a balance between her new boyfriend and Jose. Mayte announces big baby news to the group.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Jessica expresses her concerns to Mayte about her adoption plans, which Mayte shares with Drea, who becomes increasingly annoyed with Jessica and plans to confront her.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: While receiving an award, it becomes obvious that Nicole is drunk when she gets on stage. Mayte stuns everyone by introducing them to the newest member of her family.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Nicole is visited by her friend Shamicka Lawrence, the recent ex-wife of Martin Lawrence. During Sheree's birthday celebration, Drea is overcome with emotion and reveals her true feelings about Jessica.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Jessica, Sheree, and Nicole head to NYC where Nicole will be making an appearance with her fiance, Michael Strahan, on Live with Kelly and Michael. While there, the ladies meet up with Shamicka. Drea returns to Chicago.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Shaunie's surprise announcement of a trip abroad delays Evelyn's connection with flirtatious football icon Chad Ochocinco. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: The ladies' trip to Madrid suffers from both Royce's phantom illness and Tami's sudden mood swings. Jen also finds a romantic mark and the women get piggish on the local cuisine. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Jackie shoots her 1st commercial and is overwhelmed by the chaos of directing. Mehgan and new friend Patrice support Jackie's endeavor, but later Mehgan starts calling Patrice "evil". Besties Draya & Malaysia fight for the 1st time. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Malaysia meets Jackie to discuss their issues. Shaunie O'Neal joins the group and learns of the heavy drama. Draya has critical thoughts on Mehgan's performance in Jackie's commercial, which Mehgan hears at the commercial premiere. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Malaysia meets Jackie to discuss their issues. Shaunie O'Neal joins the group and learns of the heavy drama. Draya has critical thoughts on Mehgan's performance in Jackie's commercial, which Mehgan hears at the commercial premiere. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: It's time for a weekend away in Santa Barbara and at a pre-party lunch, Jackie lets loose with every drink she can get her hands on. Draya gets the side eye when she introduces her "real" friend, Angel, to the group. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Santa Barbara comes to a dramatic end when Draya prompts Mehgan to question Jackie's loyalty. Jackie's actions towards Mehgan may prove unforgivable but, back in LA, Jackie puts the blame for all the group drama on Draya. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Brandi and Mehgan bond over their hatred of crazy Jackie, and Mehgan plots her revenge for getting spit on. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Bridezillas
programme.desc: Beware of the reign of Queen Melisha as she destroys anything or anyone that gets in the way of her wedding day and Gina's southern gentleman gets on her dark side. The Bridezilla is unleashed as she kicks him to the curb...literally!

programme.title: Bridezillas
programme.desc: One week until the wedding and her dress is too big! Tension is high as Chris attempts to re-plan her entire wedding. Meanwhile, Gina is freaking out days before the big wedding.

programme.title: Bridezillas
programme.desc: Ungrateful bride-to-be Chris pushes her sister to the edge while Candice has to deal with her fiance's sisters who are trying to sabotage her wedding! Will they succeed in ruining the big day?

programme.title: Bridezillas
programme.desc: Star-crossed lovers? Candice is faced with the craziest fight in Bridezillas history as her and her fiance's families go head to head! 19-year-old bride Michelle needs to review her rules of etiquette before she goes out in public.

programme.title: Bridezillas
programme.desc: Michelle's wedding is driving her crazy as she begins to hallucinate and lose her wits! Also, meet kooky Athena. Not only does she breathe fire but she is planning a fire-themed circus style wedding! How will she deal with an unexpected crisis?

programme.title: Bridezillas
programme.desc: 4...3...2...1 - Phebie is preparing for her New Year's Eve wedding and dodging unfavorable looks from her future in-laws! Athena gets ready to celebrate with fire spinners and stilt walkers - perhaps the wildest wedding bash in Bridezillas history!

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Tonight has 'feud' written all over it with two of The Fabulous Lana Star’s past prodigies joining forces to teach Lana and her newest prodigy a lesson. Will the ghosts of Lana’s past haunt her in the ring forever or does she have a plan to prevail?

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Will the spirit of The Lioness be killed by last week’s attack or will she demonstrate the resolve to continue? Jessie Jones uses the Dixie Darlings and a tactical argument to secure a shot at the WOW Tag Team Championship Titles.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: With Keta Rush injured, can Stephy Slays find a new partner to help end Exile’s reign of brutality? The Psycho Sister’s leader Razor was taken out by a vicious and fiery attack last week.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Under suspicious and unusual circumstances, The WOW World Tag Team Championship is on the line tonight. Who will walk away with the most prestigious tag team titles in women’s wrestling?

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Tessa Blanchard finally earns her chance to redeem her loss of the WOW World Championship when she battles The Beast in the Main Event.

programme.title: Origins of WOW
programme.desc: This documentary explores the hardscrabble journey of women wrestlers,from early 20th century carnival sideshows and the male dominated world of professional wrestling,to the ultimate creation of the only all-female wrestling league in the 21st century.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Women Of Wrestling kicks off with the world champion The Beast, the biggest and the baddest phenom of wrestling, as she battles against the number one contender, New Jersey's own Adriana Gambino.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: On WOW - Women Of Wrestling, you never know who's going to show up! She's fresh, fly and funktastic — Foxxy Fierce makes her in-ring debut against the cold-hearted dissidentIce Cold — and that's only the tip of the iceberg!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The tag team tournament is underway in a big way as the Monsters of Darkness Siren the Voodoo Doll & Chainsaw battle it out against fan favorites The Bully Busters, Keta Rush & Stephy Slays!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive

programme.title: Tombstone Territory

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
